|       |  Nebula VPN                        [+ Generate Certificate]|
| SIDE  |----------------------------------------------------------|
| BAR   |                                                          |
|       |  +------+--------+----------------+----------+----------+ |
|       |  | Node | Type   | IP Address     | Expires  | Status   | |
|       |  +------+--------+----------------+----------+----------+ |
|       |  | mac  | laptop | 192.168.100.142| 364 days | * Active | |
|       |  | uat1 | ec2    | 192.168.100.10 | 340 days | * Active | |
|       |  | old  | laptop | 192.168.100.155| -        | Revoked  | |
|       |  +------+--------+----------------+----------+----------+ |
|       |                                                          |
|       |  Actions per row:  [Download Config]  [Revoke]           |
|       |                                                          |
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+

Generate Certificate slide-over:

+-------+-----------------------------------+---------------------+
|       |  (dimmed content)                  | Generate Certificate|
| SIDE  |                                    |---------------------|
| BAR   |                                    | Node Name           |
|       |                                    | [________________]  |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | Node Type           |
|       |                                    | (x) Laptop          |
|       |                                    | ( ) EC2             |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | Device Info         |
|       |                                    | [________________]  |
|       |                                    | (optional)          |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | Environment         |
|       |                                    | [uat        v]      |
|       |                                    | (EC2 only)          |
|       |                                    |                     |

|       |                                    +---------------------+
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- Certificate table with node name, type badge, IP, expiry (amber warning if < 30 days), status
- Download Config button generates/downloads the Nebula `config.yaml`
- Revoke with confirmation dialog
- Generate slide-over with conditional environment field (only for EC2)

### 6.13 My Actions (`/my-actions`)

```
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
|       |  My Actions                                               |
| SIDE  |----------------------------------------------------------|
| BAR   |                                                          |
|       |  +-------+--------+--------+-----------+------+--------+ |
|       |  | Realm | Action | Entity | Name      | Time | Revert | |
|       |  +-------+--------+--------+-----------+------+--------+ |
|       |  | acme  | CREATE | CLIENT | web-app   | 2m   |        | |
|       |  | acme  | UPDATE | ROLE   | editor    | 1h   | Revert | |
|       |  | beta  | DELETE | GROUP  | old-team  | 3h   | Revert | |
|       |  | acme  | CREATE | IDP    | google    | 5h   |        | |
|       |  +-------+--------+--------+-----------+------+--------+ |
|       |                                                          |

|       |                                                          |
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- Same as Audit Trail but scoped to current user
- Extra "Realm" column since actions span all realms
- Click row -> same diff slide-over

### 6.14 Access Denied (`/access-denied`)

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                    |
|                         (dark background)                          |
|                                                                    |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |      [Shield Icon]         |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |      Access Denied          |                  |
|                    |   You need SUPER_ADMIN      |                  |
|                    |   role to access this app.  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |  |    Sign Out          |  |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                                                                    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

- No sidebar, same centered card pattern as login
- Clear message about required role
- Sign out button

---

## 7. Routing (File-Based)

```mermaid
graph TD
    LOGIN["/login"] --> REALMS["/realms"]
    REALMS --> REALM["/realms/[name]"]
    REALM --> DASHBOARD["/realms/[name] (dashboard)"]
    REALM --> CLIENTS["/realms/[name]/clients"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_CREATE["/realms/[name]/clients/create"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/clients/[clientId]"]
    REALM --> USERS["/realms/[name]/users"]
    USERS --> USER_CREATE["/realms/[name]/users/create"]
    USERS --> USER_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/users/[userId]"]
    REALM --> ROLES["/realms/[name]/roles"]
    ROLES --> ROLE_CREATE["/realms/[name]/roles/create"]
    REALM --> GROUPS["/realms/[name]/groups"]
    GROUPS --> GROUP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/groups/create"]
    REALM --> IDP["/realms/[name]/idp"]
    IDP --> IDP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/idp/create"]
    REALM --> NEBULA["/realms/[name]/nebula"]
    REALM --> AUDIT["/realms/[name]/audit"]
    MY_ACTIONS["/my-actions"]
    ACCESS_DENIED["/access-denied"]
```

No route changes except adding `/realms/[name]/nebula`.

---

## 8. Dependency Changes

### Remove

| Package | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| `primevue` | Replaced by Tailwind + Headless UI |
| `@primevue/themes` | No longer needed |
| `primeicons` | Replaced by Heroicons |

### Add

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@headlessui/vue` | ^1.7 | Accessible primitives (Dialog, Menu, Transition, Tab, etc.) |
| `@heroicons/vue` | ^2.1 | Icon set matching Catalyst |
| `@tailwindcss/forms` | ^0.5 | Form element reset/styling |
| `@tailwindcss/typography` | ^0.5 | Prose styling for rich text |

### Keep (Unchanged)

- `vue@^3.5`, `vue-router`, `pinia`, `pinia-plugin-persistedstate`
- `axios`, `keycloak-js`
- `unplugin-vue-router`
- `@opentelemetry/*` stack
- `typescript`, `vite`, `eslint`

---

## 9. File Structure

```
web/src/
+-- components/
|   +-- ui/                          # Design system (Catalyst port)
|   |   +-- Button.vue
|   |   +-- Badge.vue
|   |   +-- Table.vue
|   |   +-- StackedList.vue
|   |   +-- DescriptionList.vue
|   |   +-- Dialog.vue
|   |   +-- SlideOver.vue
|   |   +-- Dropdown.vue
|   |   +-- EmptyState.vue
|   |   +-- Stats.vue
|   |   +-- Toast.vue
|   |   +-- Input.vue
|   +-- layout/                      # App shell
|   |   +-- SidebarLayout.vue
|   |   +-- SidebarNav.vue
|   |   +-- RealmSwitcher.vue
|   |   +-- UserMenu.vue
|   +-- audit/
|   |   +-- AuditTable.vue
|   |   +-- AuditDiffSlideOver.vue
|   +-- clients/
|   |   +-- ClientCard.vue
|   |   +-- ClientDetail.vue
|   |   +-- CreateApplicationSlideOver.vue
|   +-- users/
|   |   +-- UserTable.vue
|   |   +-- UserDetail.vue
|   +-- nebula/                      # New
|   |   +-- CertificateList.vue
|   |   +-- GenerateCertSlideOver.vue
+-- pages/                           # File-based routing (same structure)
+-- api/                             # Unchanged
+-- stores/                          # Unchanged + nebula store
+-- types/                           # Unchanged + nebula types
+-- utils/                           # Unchanged
```

---

## 10. Migration Strategy

The migration is a **full visual rewrite** — every page template changes, but business logic (API clients, stores, types, router guards, Keycloak integration) stays identical.

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Foundation"]
        A1[Install deps, configure Tailwind]
        A2[Build UI primitives]
        A3[Build SidebarLayout + RealmSwitcher]
    end
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Core Pages"]
        B1[Login page]
        B2[Realm Dashboard]
        B3[Clients list + detail + create]
        B4[Users list + detail + create]
    end
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Remaining Pages"]
        C1[Roles list + create]
        C2[Groups list + create]
        C3[Identity Providers]
        C4[Audit Trail + Diff viewer]
        C5[My Actions]
    end
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: New Features"]
        D1[Nebula VPN page]
        D2[Dark/light toggle]
        D3[Polish + responsive]
    end
    Phase1 --> Phase2 --> Phase3 --> Phase4
```

### Key Constraint

- **No PrimeVue/Tailwind hybrid phase** — remove PrimeVue once Phase 1 UI primitives are ready, then rebuild pages against the new components. Mixing two component libraries creates visual inconsistency.

---

## 11. Out of Scope

- Backend API changes (none needed, all endpoints exist)
- Keycloak configuration changes
- Mobile-native app
- i18n / localization (can be added later)
- E2E tests (separate effort)

# Frontend Redesign: Catalyst-Style Vue 3 Admin Portal

**Date:** 2026-04-02  
**Status:** Approved  
**Scope:** Complete frontend UI redesign — migrate from PrimeVue to Tailwind CSS + Headless UI, port Catalyst design patterns to Vue 3

---

## 1. Motivation

The current admin portal uses PrimeVue 4 (Aura theme). While functional, it looks generic. The goal is a best-in-class SaaS admin experience using Tailwind Plus (Tailwind UI) — specifically porting [Catalyst](https://tailwindui.com/templates/catalyst)'s dark-first design language to Vue 3.

Catalyst is React-only. The strategy: use `@headlessui/vue` (official Vue port of the same accessibility primitives) and replicate Catalyst's exact Tailwind class patterns in Vue SFCs.

---

## 2. Design Principles

- **Dark mode first** — dark zinc sidebar, content area toggles dark/light
- **Information density over decoration** — show data, not chrome
- **One realm in focus** — sidebar-top dropdown switches realm context
- **Slide-overs over modals** — create/edit forms use slide-over panels, not blocking dialogs
- **Consistent component vocabulary** — ~12 reusable primitives, used everywhere

---

## 3. Layout Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Shell["App Shell"]
        direction TB
        subgraph Sidebar["Dark Sidebar (zinc-900)"]
            RS[Realm Switcher Dropdown]
            NAV[Nav Items]
            UM[User Menu + Sign Out]
        end
        subgraph Content["Content Area"]
            HEADER[Page Header + Breadcrumbs]
            BODY[Page Content]
        end
    end
    RS --> NAV --> UM
    Sidebar --- Content
```

### Sidebar Navigation Items

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Realm Switcher] --> B[Dashboard]
    B --> C[Clients]
    C --> D[Users]
    D --> E[Roles]
    E --> F[Groups]
    F --> G[Identity Providers]
    G --> H[Audit Trail]
    H --> I[---]
    J --> K[My Actions]
    K --> L[User Menu / Sign Out]
```

---

## 4. Color System

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **Neutral** | Zinc scale | Sidebar, borders, text, backgrounds |
| **Primary** | Indigo | Active nav, primary buttons, links |
| **Danger** | Red | Delete actions, error states |
| **Warning** | Amber | Expiry warnings, caution badges |
| **Success** | Emerald | Enabled states, success toasts |

Typography: **Inter** (already in use), `text-sm` base, `font-semibold` headings. Follows Catalyst's type scale.

---

## 5. Component Library

Reusable Vue SFCs porting Catalyst's patterns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Primitives["UI Primitives (components/ui/)"]
        BTN[Button.vue]
        BDG[Badge.vue]
        TBL[Table.vue]
        SL[StackedList.vue]
        DL[DescriptionList.vue]
        DLG[Dialog.vue]
        SO[SlideOver.vue]
        DD[Dropdown.vue]
        ES[EmptyState.vue]
        ST[Stats.vue]
        TST[Toast.vue]
        INP[Input.vue]
    end

    subgraph Layout["Layout (components/layout/)"]
        SBL[SidebarLayout.vue]
        SBN[SidebarNav.vue]
        RSW[RealmSwitcher.vue]
        UMN[UserMenu.vue]
    end

    subgraph Domain["Domain Components"]
        CC[ClientCard.vue]
        CD[ClientDetail.vue]
        UT[UserTable.vue]
        UD[UserDetail.vue]
        AT[AuditTable.vue]
        AD[AuditDiffSlideOver.vue]
        CL[CertificateList.vue]
        GC[GenerateCertSlideOver.vue]
    end

    Layout --> Primitives
    Domain --> Primitives
```

### Component Specifications

| Component | Headless UI Primitive | Purpose |
|-----------|----------------------|---------|
| `Button` | — | Primary (indigo), secondary (zinc), danger (red), ghost variants |
| `Badge` | — | Status dots + labels (enabled/disabled, public/confidential, etc.) |
| `Table` | — | Sortable columns, row click, pagination footer |
| `StackedList` | — | Card-style list for clients, roles, groups, IDPs |
| `DescriptionList` | — | Key-value layout for detail pages |
| `Dialog` | `DialogPanel` | Confirmation dialogs (delete, revert) |
| `SlideOver` | `DialogPanel` | Create/edit forms slide in from right |
| `Dropdown` | `Menu` | Realm switcher, user menu, action menus |
| `EmptyState` | — | Illustrated placeholder when lists are empty |
| `Stats` | — | Dashboard summary cards with label + value + trend |
| `Toast` | `Transition` | Success/error notifications, auto-dismiss |
| `Input` | — | Text, select, textarea with label + error state |

---

## 6. Page Wireframes

Every page below is shown as an ASCII wireframe. The left sidebar is consistent across all authenticated pages.

### 6.1 Login (`/login`)

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                    |
|                         (dark background)                          |
|                                                                    |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |      [Ravencloak Logo]     |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |   Multi-tenant auth admin  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |  | Sign in with Keycloak|  |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                                                                    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

- No sidebar, full-page centered card
- Single CTA redirects to Keycloak
- After auth, redirects to `/realms`

### 6.2 Realm Dashboard (`/realms/[name]`)

```
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
|       |  Dashboard                                                |
| SIDE  |----------------------------------------------------------|
| BAR   |  +------------+ +------------+ +----------+ +----------+ |
|       |  | Clients    | | Users      | | Roles    | | Groups   | |
|       |  |     12     | |     148    | |    8     | |    5     | |
| +---+ |  +------------+ +------------+ +----------+ +----------+ |
| |Rlm| |                                                          |
| |Swi| |  Recent Activity                                         |
| |tch| |  +-------------------------------------------------+    |
| +---+ |  | * admin@co created client "web-app"    2 min ago |    |
|       |  | * admin@co updated role "editor"       1 hr ago  |    |
| Dash  |  | * admin@co added IDP "google-sso"      3 hr ago  |    |
| Clnts |  | * admin@co created user "jane@co"      5 hr ago  |    |
| Users |  | * admin@co synced realm                 1 day ago |    |
| Roles |  +-------------------------------------------------+    |
| Grps  |                                                          |
| IDP   |  Quick Actions                                           |
|       |  [+ Create Client]  [+ Add User]  [Sync Realm]          |
| Audit |                                                          |
|       |                                                          |
| ---   |                                                          |
| MyAct |                                                          |
| [ava] |                                                          |
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- 4 stat cards in a row (click-through to respective list page)
- Mini audit timeline (last 5 events)
- Quick action buttons for most common tasks

### 6.3 Clients List (`/realms/[name]/clients`)

```
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
|       |  Clients                              [+ Create App]      |
| SIDE  |----------------------------------------------------------|
| BAR   |  [Applications]  [Custom Clients]                        |
|       |                                                          |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |  | my-web-app                    Full Stack   * active |  |
|       |  | Frontend + Backend paired        3 redirect URIs   |  |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |  | api-service                   Backend     * active |  |
|       |  | Confidential client              Service accounts  |  |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |  | admin-portal                  Frontend    * active |  |
|       |  | Public client                    1 redirect URI    |  |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |  | legacy-client                 Custom     o disabled|  |
|       |  | Direct access grants enabled                       |  |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |                                                          |
|       |                                                          |
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- Tabs: "Applications" (auto-paired) vs "Custom Clients"
- Stacked list cards with type badge, status dot, metadata
- Click card -> detail page
- Create button opens slide-over

### 6.4 Client Detail (`/realms/[name]/clients/[clientId]`)

```
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
|       |  < Back to Clients                                        |
| SIDE  |                                                          |
| BAR   |  my-web-app                        [* Enabled] [Delete]  |
|       |----------------------------------------------------------|
|       |  [Settings]  [URLs]  [Secrets]  [Integration]  [Paired]  |
|       |                                                          |
|       |  Settings                                                |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |  | Client ID        | my-web-app-web                 |  |
|       |  | Client Type      | Public                         |  |
|       |  | Application Type | Full Stack (Frontend)          |  |
|       |  | Standard Flow    | Enabled                        |  |
|       |  | Direct Access    | Disabled                       |  |
|       |  | Service Accounts | Disabled                       |  |
|       |  | Root URL         | https://app.example.com        |  |
|       |  | Created          | 2026-03-15 10:30               |  |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |                                                          |
|       |  Paired Backend Client                                   |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |  | my-web-app-backend (confidential)      [View ->]   |  |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |
|       |                                                          |
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- Back link at top
- Tabbed sections: Settings (description list), URLs (editable redirect URIs + web origins), Secrets (copy/regenerate), Integration (code snippets), Paired (link to paired client)
- Delete button with confirmation dialog

### 6.5 Create Application (Slide-Over)

```
+-------+-----------------------------------+---------------------+
|       |  (dimmed content behind)           | Create Application  |
| SIDE  |                                    |---------------------|
| BAR   |                                    | Application Name    |
|       |                                    | [________________]  |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | Type                |
|       |                                    | ( ) Frontend Only   |
|       |                                    | (x) Full Stack      |
|       |                                    | ( ) Backend Only    |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | Root URL            |
|       |                                    | [________________]  |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | Redirect URIs       |
|       |                                    | [________________]  |
|       |                                    | [+ Add another]     |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | Web Origins         |
|       |                                    | [________________]  |
|       |                                    | [+ Add another]     |
|       |                                    |                     |
|       |                                    | [Cancel]  [Create]  |
|       |                                    +---------------------+
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- Slides in from right, dims content behind
- Form fields with validation
- URL fields auto-format (via existing `urlTransform.ts`)

### 6.6 Users List (`/realms/[name]/users`)

```
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
|       |  Users                                    [+ Add User]    |
| SIDE  |----------------------------------------------------------|
| BAR   |  [Search users________________________] [Search]          |
|       |                                                          |
|       |  +------+----------+------------------+--------+-------+ |
|       |  | User | Name     | Email            | Status | Login | |
|       |  +------+----------+------------------+--------+-------+ |
|       |  | [av] | Jane Doe | jane@company.com | Active | 2h ago| |
|       |  | [av] | John S.  | john@company.com | Active | 1d ago| |
|       |  | [av] | Bob K.   | bob@company.com  | Invite | Never | |

|       |  | [av] | Tom B.   | tom@company.com  | Locked | 3d ago| |

|       |                                                          |
|       |              < 1  2  3  ...  12 >                        |
|       |                                                          |
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- Full table with avatar, name, email, status badge, last login
- Search bar triggers BM25 full-text search
- Click row -> user detail
- Pagination footer

### 6.7 User Detail (`/realms/[name]/users/[userId]`)

```
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
|       |  < Back to Users                                          |
| SIDE  |                                                          |
| BAR   |  [avatar]  Jane Doe                [Active]   [Delete]   |
|       |            jane@company.com                               |
|       |----------------------------------------------------------|
|       |                                                          |
|       |  Profile                                                 |
|       |  +----------------------------------------------------+  |

---

## 7. Routing (File-Based)

```mermaid
graph TD
    LOGIN["/login"] --> REALMS["/realms"]
    REALMS --> REALM["/realms/[name]"]
    REALM --> DASHBOARD["/realms/[name] (dashboard)"]
    REALM --> CLIENTS["/realms/[name]/clients"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_CREATE["/realms/[name]/clients/create"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/clients/[clientId]"]
    REALM --> USERS["/realms/[name]/users"]
    USERS --> USER_CREATE["/realms/[name]/users/create"]
    USERS --> USER_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/users/[userId]"]
    REALM --> ROLES["/realms/[name]/roles"]
    ROLES --> ROLE_CREATE["/realms/[name]/roles/create"]
    REALM --> GROUPS["/realms/[name]/groups"]
    GROUPS --> GROUP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/groups/create"]
    REALM --> IDP["/realms/[name]/idp"]
    IDP --> IDP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/idp/create"]
    REALM --> NEBULA["/realms/[name]/nebula"]
    REALM --> AUDIT["/realms/[name]/audit"]
    MY_ACTIONS["/my-actions"]
    ACCESS_DENIED["/access-denied"]
```

No route changes except adding `/realms/[name]/nebula`.

---

## 8. Dependency Changes

### Remove

| Package | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| `primevue` | Replaced by Tailwind + Headless UI |
| `@primevue/themes` | No longer needed |
| `primeicons` | Replaced by Heroicons |

### Add

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@headlessui/vue` | ^1.7 | Accessible primitives (Dialog, Menu, Transition, Tab, etc.) |
| `@heroicons/vue` | ^2.1 | Icon set matching Catalyst |
| `@tailwindcss/forms` | ^0.5 | Form element reset/styling |
| `@tailwindcss/typography` | ^0.5 | Prose styling for rich text |

### Keep (Unchanged)

- `vue@^3.5`, `vue-router`, `pinia`, `pinia-plugin-persistedstate`
- `axios`, `keycloak-js`
- `unplugin-vue-router`
- `@opentelemetry/*` stack
- `typescript`, `vite`, `eslint`

---

## 9. File Structure

```
web/src/
+-- components/
|   +-- ui/                          # Design system (Catalyst port)
|   |   +-- Button.vue
|   |   +-- Badge.vue
|   |   +-- Table.vue
|   |   +-- StackedList.vue
|   |   +-- DescriptionList.vue
|   |   +-- Dialog.vue
|   |   +-- SlideOver.vue
|   |   +-- Dropdown.vue
|   |   +-- EmptyState.vue
|   |   +-- Stats.vue
|   |   +-- Toast.vue
|   |   +-- Input.vue
|   +-- layout/                      # App shell
|   |   +-- SidebarLayout.vue
|   |   +-- SidebarNav.vue
|   |   +-- RealmSwitcher.vue
|   |   +-- UserMenu.vue
|   +-- audit/
|   |   +-- AuditTable.vue
|   |   +-- AuditDiffSlideOver.vue
|   +-- clients/
|   |   +-- ClientCard.vue
|   |   +-- ClientDetail.vue
|   |   +-- CreateApplicationSlideOver.vue
|   +-- users/
|   |   +-- UserTable.vue
|   |   +-- UserDetail.vue
|   +-- nebula/                      # New
|   |   +-- CertificateList.vue
|   |   +-- GenerateCertSlideOver.vue
+-- pages/                           # File-based routing (same structure)
+-- api/                             # Unchanged
+-- stores/                          # Unchanged + nebula store
+-- types/                           # Unchanged + nebula types
+-- utils/                           # Unchanged
```

---

## 10. Migration Strategy

The migration is a **full visual rewrite** — every page template changes, but business logic (API clients, stores, types, router guards, Keycloak integration) stays identical.

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Foundation"]
        A1[Install deps, configure Tailwind]
        A2[Build UI primitives]
        A3[Build SidebarLayout + RealmSwitcher]
    end
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Core Pages"]
        B1[Login page]
        B2[Realm Dashboard]
        B3[Clients list + detail + create]
        B4[Users list + detail + create]
    end
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Remaining Pages"]
        C1[Roles list + create]
        C2[Groups list + create]
        C3[Identity Providers]
        C4[Audit Trail + Diff viewer]
        C5[My Actions]
    end
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: New Features"]
        D1[Nebula VPN page]
        D2[Dark/light toggle]
        D3[Polish + responsive]
    end
    Phase1 --> Phase2 --> Phase3 --> Phase4
```

### Key Constraint

- **No PrimeVue/Tailwind hybrid phase** — remove PrimeVue once Phase 1 UI primitives are ready, then rebuild pages against the new components. Mixing two component libraries creates visual inconsistency.

---

## 11. Out of Scope

- Backend API changes (none needed, all endpoints exist)
- Keycloak configuration changes
- Mobile-native app
- i18n / localization (can be added later)
- E2E tests (separate effort)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Frontend Redesign: Catalyst-Style Vue 3 Admin Portal

**Date:** 2026-04-02  
**Status:** Approved  
**Scope:** Complete frontend UI redesign — migrate from PrimeVue to Tailwind CSS + Headless UI, port Catalyst design patterns to Vue 3

---

## 1. Motivation

The current admin portal uses PrimeVue 4 (Aura theme). While functional, it looks generic. The goal is a best-in-class SaaS admin experience using Tailwind Plus (Tailwind UI) — specifically porting [Catalyst](https://tailwindui.com/templates/catalyst)'s dark-first design language to Vue 3.

Catalyst is React-only. The strategy: use `@headlessui/vue` (official Vue port of the same accessibility primitives) and replicate Catalyst's exact Tailwind class patterns in Vue SFCs.

---

## 2. Design Principles

- **Dark mode first** — dark zinc sidebar, content area toggles dark/light
- **Information density over decoration** — show data, not chrome
- **One realm in focus** — sidebar-top dropdown switches realm context
- **Slide-overs over modals** — create/edit forms use slide-over panels, not blocking dialogs
- **Consistent component vocabulary** — ~12 reusable primitives, used everywhere

---

## 3. Layout Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Shell["App Shell"]
        direction TB
        subgraph Sidebar["Dark Sidebar (zinc-900)"]
            RS[Realm Switcher Dropdown]
            NAV[Nav Items]
            UM[User Menu + Sign Out]
        end
        subgraph Content["Content Area"]
            HEADER[Page Header + Breadcrumbs]
            BODY[Page Content]
        end
    end
    RS --> NAV --> UM
    Sidebar --- Content
```

### Sidebar Navigation Items

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Realm Switcher] --> B[Dashboard]
    B --> C[Clients]
    C --> D[Users]
    D --> E[Roles]
    E --> F[Groups]
    F --> G[Identity Providers]
    G --> H[Audit Trail]
    H --> I[---]
    J --> K[My Actions]
    K --> L[User Menu / Sign Out]
```

---

## 4. Color System

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **Neutral** | Zinc scale | Sidebar, borders, text, backgrounds |
| **Primary** | Indigo | Active nav, primary buttons, links |
| **Danger** | Red | Delete actions, error states |
| **Warning** | Amber | Expiry warnings, caution badges |
| **Success** | Emerald | Enabled states, success toasts |

Typography: **Inter** (already in use), `text-sm` base, `font-semibold` headings. Follows Catalyst's type scale.

---

## 5. Component Library

Reusable Vue SFCs porting Catalyst's patterns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Primitives["UI Primitives (components/ui/)"]
        BTN[Button.vue]
        BDG[Badge.vue]
        TBL[Table.vue]
        SL[StackedList.vue]
        DL[DescriptionList.vue]
        DLG[Dialog.vue]
        SO[SlideOver.vue]
        DD[Dropdown.vue]
        ES[EmptyState.vue]
        ST[Stats.vue]
        TST[Toast.vue]
        INP[Input.vue]
    end

    subgraph Layout["Layout (components/layout/)"]
        SBL[SidebarLayout.vue]
        SBN[SidebarNav.vue]
        RSW[RealmSwitcher.vue]
        UMN[UserMenu.vue]
    end

    subgraph Domain["Domain Components"]
        CC[ClientCard.vue]
        CD[ClientDetail.vue]
        UT[UserTable.vue]
        UD[UserDetail.vue]
        AT[AuditTable.vue]
        AD[AuditDiffSlideOver.vue]
        CL[CertificateList.vue]
        GC[GenerateCertSlideOver.vue]
    end

    Layout --> Primitives
    Domain --> Primitives
```

### Component Specifications

| Component | Headless UI Primitive | Purpose |
|-----------|----------------------|---------|
| `Button` | — | Primary (indigo), secondary (zinc), danger (red), ghost variants |
| `Badge` | — | Status dots + labels (enabled/disabled, public/confidential, etc.) |
| `Table` | — | Sortable columns, row click, pagination footer |
| `StackedList` | — | Card-style list for clients, roles, groups, IDPs |
| `DescriptionList` | — | Key-value layout for detail pages |
| `Dialog` | `DialogPanel` | Confirmation dialogs (delete, revert) |
| `SlideOver` | `DialogPanel` | Create/edit forms slide in from right |
| `Dropdown` | `Menu` | Realm switcher, user menu, action menus |
| `EmptyState` | — | Illustrated placeholder when lists are empty |
| `Stats` | — | Dashboard summary cards with label + value + trend |
| `Toast` | `Transition` | Success/error notifications, auto-dismiss |
| `Input` | — | Text, select, textarea with label + error state |

---

## 6. Page Wireframes

Every page below is shown as an ASCII wireframe. The left sidebar is consistent across all authenticated pages.

### 6.1 Login (`/login`)

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+

---

## 7. Routing (File-Based)

```mermaid
graph TD
    LOGIN["/login"] --> REALMS["/realms"]
    REALMS --> REALM["/realms/[name]"]
    REALM --> DASHBOARD["/realms/[name] (dashboard)"]
    REALM --> CLIENTS["/realms/[name]/clients"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_CREATE["/realms/[name]/clients/create"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/clients/[clientId]"]
    REALM --> USERS["/realms/[name]/users"]
    USERS --> USER_CREATE["/realms/[name]/users/create"]
    USERS --> USER_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/users/[userId]"]
    REALM --> ROLES["/realms/[name]/roles"]
    ROLES --> ROLE_CREATE["/realms/[name]/roles/create"]
    REALM --> GROUPS["/realms/[name]/groups"]
    GROUPS --> GROUP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/groups/create"]
    REALM --> IDP["/realms/[name]/idp"]
    IDP --> IDP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/idp/create"]
    REALM --> NEBULA["/realms/[name]/nebula"]
    REALM --> AUDIT["/realms/[name]/audit"]
    MY_ACTIONS["/my-actions"]
    ACCESS_DENIED["/access-denied"]
```

No route changes except adding `/realms/[name]/nebula`.

---

## 8. Dependency Changes

### Remove

| Package | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| `primevue` | Replaced by Tailwind + Headless UI |
| `@primevue/themes` | No longer needed |
| `primeicons` | Replaced by Heroicons |

### Add

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@headlessui/vue` | ^1.7 | Accessible primitives (Dialog, Menu, Transition, Tab, etc.) |
| `@heroicons/vue` | ^2.1 | Icon set matching Catalyst |
| `@tailwindcss/forms` | ^0.5 | Form element reset/styling |
| `@tailwindcss/typography` | ^0.5 | Prose styling for rich text |

### Keep (Unchanged)

- `vue@^3.5`, `vue-router`, `pinia`, `pinia-plugin-persistedstate`
- `axios`, `keycloak-js`
- `unplugin-vue-router`
- `@opentelemetry/*` stack
- `typescript`, `vite`, `eslint`

---

## 9. File Structure

```
web/src/
+-- components/
|   +-- ui/                          # Design system (Catalyst port)
|   |   +-- Button.vue
|   |   +-- Badge.vue
|   |   +-- Table.vue
|   |   +-- StackedList.vue
|   |   +-- DescriptionList.vue
|   |   +-- Dialog.vue
|   |   +-- SlideOver.vue
|   |   +-- Dropdown.vue
|   |   +-- EmptyState.vue
|   |   +-- Stats.vue
|   |   +-- Toast.vue
|   |   +-- Input.vue
|   +-- layout/                      # App shell
|   |   +-- SidebarLayout.vue
|   |   +-- SidebarNav.vue
|   |   +-- RealmSwitcher.vue
|   |   +-- UserMenu.vue
|   +-- audit/
|   |   +-- AuditTable.vue
|   |   +-- AuditDiffSlideOver.vue
|   +-- clients/
|   |   +-- ClientCard.vue
|   |   +-- ClientDetail.vue
|   |   +-- CreateApplicationSlideOver.vue
|   +-- users/
|   |   +-- UserTable.vue
|   |   +-- UserDetail.vue
|   +-- nebula/                      # New
|   |   +-- CertificateList.vue
|   |   +-- GenerateCertSlideOver.vue
+-- pages/                           # File-based routing (same structure)
+-- api/                             # Unchanged
+-- stores/                          # Unchanged + nebula store
+-- types/                           # Unchanged + nebula types
+-- utils/                           # Unchanged
```

---

## 10. Migration Strategy

The migration is a **full visual rewrite** — every page template changes, but business logic (API clients, stores, types, router guards, Keycloak integration) stays identical.

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Foundation"]
        A1[Install deps, configure Tailwind]
        A2[Build UI primitives]
        A3[Build SidebarLayout + RealmSwitcher]
    end
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Core Pages"]
        B1[Login page]
        B2[Realm Dashboard]
        B3[Clients list + detail + create]
        B4[Users list + detail + create]
    end
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Remaining Pages"]
        C1[Roles list + create]
        C2[Groups list + create]
        C3[Identity Providers]
        C4[Audit Trail + Diff viewer]
        C5[My Actions]
    end
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: New Features"]
        D1[Nebula VPN page]
        D2[Dark/light toggle]
        D3[Polish + responsive]
    end
    Phase1 --> Phase2 --> Phase3 --> Phase4
```

### Key Constraint

- **No PrimeVue/Tailwind hybrid phase** — remove PrimeVue once Phase 1 UI primitives are ready, then rebuild pages against the new components. Mixing two component libraries creates visual inconsistency.

---

## 11. Out of Scope

- Backend API changes (none needed, all endpoints exist)
- Keycloak configuration changes
- Mobile-native app
- i18n / localization (can be added later)
- E2E tests (separate effort)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Frontend Redesign: Catalyst-Style Vue 3 Admin Portal

**Date:** 2026-04-02  
**Status:** Approved  
**Scope:** Complete frontend UI redesign — migrate from PrimeVue to Tailwind CSS + Headless UI, port Catalyst design patterns to Vue 3

---

## 1. Motivation

The current admin portal uses PrimeVue 4 (Aura theme). While functional, it looks generic. The goal is a best-in-class SaaS admin experience using Tailwind Plus (Tailwind UI) — specifically porting [Catalyst](https://tailwindui.com/templates/catalyst)'s dark-first design language to Vue 3.

Catalyst is React-only. The strategy: use `@headlessui/vue` (official Vue port of the same accessibility primitives) and replicate Catalyst's exact Tailwind class patterns in Vue SFCs.

---

## 2. Design Principles

- **Dark mode first** — dark zinc sidebar, content area toggles dark/light
- **Information density over decoration** — show data, not chrome
- **One realm in focus** — sidebar-top dropdown switches realm context
- **Slide-overs over modals** — create/edit forms use slide-over panels, not blocking dialogs
- **Consistent component vocabulary** — ~12 reusable primitives, used everywhere

---

## 3. Layout Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Shell["App Shell"]
        direction TB
        subgraph Sidebar["Dark Sidebar (zinc-900)"]
            RS[Realm Switcher Dropdown]
            NAV[Nav Items]
            UM[User Menu + Sign Out]
        end
        subgraph Content["Content Area"]
            HEADER[Page Header + Breadcrumbs]
            BODY[Page Content]
        end
    end
    RS --> NAV --> UM
    Sidebar --- Content
```

### Sidebar Navigation Items

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Realm Switcher] --> B[Dashboard]
    B --> C[Clients]
    C --> D[Users]
    D --> E[Roles]
    E --> F[Groups]
    F --> G[Identity Providers]
    G --> H[Audit Trail]
    H --> I[---]
    J --> K[My Actions]
    K --> L[User Menu / Sign Out]
```

---

## 4. Color System

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **Neutral** | Zinc scale | Sidebar, borders, text, backgrounds |
| **Primary** | Indigo | Active nav, primary buttons, links |
| **Danger** | Red | Delete actions, error states |
| **Warning** | Amber | Expiry warnings, caution badges |
| **Success** | Emerald | Enabled states, success toasts |

Typography: **Inter** (already in use), `text-sm` base, `font-semibold` headings. Follows Catalyst's type scale.

---

## 5. Component Library

Reusable Vue SFCs porting Catalyst's patterns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Primitives["UI Primitives (components/ui/)"]
        BTN[Button.vue]
        BDG[Badge.vue]
        TBL[Table.vue]
        SL[StackedList.vue]
        DL[DescriptionList.vue]
        DLG[Dialog.vue]
        SO[SlideOver.vue]
        DD[Dropdown.vue]
        ES[EmptyState.vue]
        ST[Stats.vue]
        TST[Toast.vue]
        INP[Input.vue]
    end

    subgraph Layout["Layout (components/layout/)"]
        SBL[SidebarLayout.vue]
        SBN[SidebarNav.vue]
        RSW[RealmSwitcher.vue]
        UMN[UserMenu.vue]
    end

    subgraph Domain["Domain Components"]
        CC[ClientCard.vue]
        CD[ClientDetail.vue]
        UT[UserTable.vue]
        UD[UserDetail.vue]
        AT[AuditTable.vue]
        AD[AuditDiffSlideOver.vue]
        CL[CertificateList.vue]
        GC[GenerateCertSlideOver.vue]
    end

    Layout --> Primitives
    Domain --> Primitives
```

### Component Specifications

| Component | Headless UI Primitive | Purpose |
|-----------|----------------------|---------|
| `Button` | — | Primary (indigo), secondary (zinc), danger (red), ghost variants |
| `Badge` | — | Status dots + labels (enabled/disabled, public/confidential, etc.) |
| `Table` | — | Sortable columns, row click, pagination footer |
| `StackedList` | — | Card-style list for clients, roles, groups, IDPs |
| `DescriptionList` | — | Key-value layout for detail pages |
| `Dialog` | `DialogPanel` | Confirmation dialogs (delete, revert) |
| `SlideOver` | `DialogPanel` | Create/edit forms slide in from right |
| `Dropdown` | `Menu` | Realm switcher, user menu, action menus |
| `EmptyState` | — | Illustrated placeholder when lists are empty |
| `Stats` | — | Dashboard summary cards with label + value + trend |
| `Toast` | `Transition` | Success/error notifications, auto-dismiss |
| `Input` | — | Text, select, textarea with label + error state |

---

## 6. Page Wireframes

Every page below is shown as an ASCII wireframe. The left sidebar is consistent across all authenticated pages.

### 6.1 Login (`/login`)

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                    |
|                         (dark background)                          |
|                                                                    |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |      [Ravencloak Logo]     |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |   Multi-tenant auth admin  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |  | Sign in with Keycloak|  |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                                                                    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

- No sidebar, full-page centered card
- Single CTA redirects to Keycloak
- After auth, redirects to `/realms`

### 6.2 Realm Dashboard (`/realms/[name]`)

```
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
|       |  Dashboard                                                |
| SIDE  |----------------------------------------------------------|
| BAR   |  +------------+ +------------+ +----------+ +----------+ |
|       |  | Clients    | | Users      | | Roles    | | Groups   | |
|       |  |     12     | |     148    | |    8     | |    5     | |
| +---+ |  +------------+ +------------+ +----------+ +----------+ |
| |Rlm| |                                                          |
| |Swi| |  Recent Activity                                         |
| |tch| |  +-------------------------------------------------+    |
| +---+ |  | * admin@co created client "web-app"    2 min ago |    |
|       |  | * admin@co updated role "editor"       1 hr ago  |    |
| Dash  |  | * admin@co added IDP "google-sso"      3 hr ago  |    |
| Clnts |  | * admin@co created user "jane@co"      5 hr ago  |    |
| Users |  | * admin@co synced realm                 1 day ago |    |
| Roles |  +-------------------------------------------------+    |
| Grps  |                                                          |
| IDP   |  Quick Actions                                           |
|       |  [+ Create Client]  [+ Add User]  [Sync Realm]          |
| Audit |                                                          |
|       |                                                          |
| ---   |                                                          |
| MyAct |                                                          |
| [ava] |                                                          |
+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- 4 stat cards in a row (click-through to respective list page)
- Mini audit timeline (last 5 events)
- Quick action buttons for most common tasks

### 6.3 Clients List (`/realms/[name]/clients`)

## 7. Routing (File-Based)

```mermaid
graph TD
    LOGIN["/login"] --> REALMS["/realms"]

    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/clients/[clientId]"]
    REALM --> USERS["/realms/[name]/users"]
    USERS --> USER_CREATE["/realms/[name]/users/create"]
    USERS --> USER_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/users/[userId]"]
    REALM --> ROLES["/realms/[name]/roles"]
    ROLES --> ROLE_CREATE["/realms/[name]/roles/create"]
    REALM --> GROUPS["/realms/[name]/groups"]
    GROUPS --> GROUP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/groups/create"]
    REALM --> IDP["/realms/[name]/idp"]
    IDP --> IDP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/idp/create"]
    REALM --> NEBULA["/realms/[name]/nebula"]

No route changes except adding `/realms/[name]/nebula`.

---

## 8. Dependency Changes

### Remove

| Package | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| `primevue` | Replaced by Tailwind + Headless UI |
| `@primevue/themes` | No longer needed |
| `primeicons` | Replaced by Heroicons |

### Add

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@headlessui/vue` | ^1.7 | Accessible primitives (Dialog, Menu, Transition, Tab, etc.) |
| `@heroicons/vue` | ^2.1 | Icon set matching Catalyst |
| `@tailwindcss/forms` | ^0.5 | Form element reset/styling |
| `@tailwindcss/typography` | ^0.5 | Prose styling for rich text |

### Keep (Unchanged)

- `vue@^3.5`, `vue-router`, `pinia`, `pinia-plugin-persistedstate`
- `axios`, `keycloak-js`
- `unplugin-vue-router`
- `@opentelemetry/*` stack
- `typescript`, `vite`, `eslint`

---

|   |   +-- ClientDetail.vue
|   |   +-- CreateApplicationSlideOver.vue
|   +-- users/
|   |   +-- UserTable.vue
|   |   +-- UserDetail.vue
+-- pages/                           # File-based routing (same structure)
+-- api/                             # Unchanged
+-- stores/                          # Unchanged
+-- types/                           # Unchanged
+-- utils/                           # Unchanged
```

---

## 10. Migration Strategy

The migration is a **full visual rewrite** — every page template changes, but business logic (API clients, stores, types, router guards, Keycloak integration) stays identical.

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Foundation"]
        A1[Install deps, configure Tailwind]
        A2[Build UI primitives]
        A3[Build SidebarLayout + RealmSwitcher]
    end
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Core Pages"]
        B1[Login page]
        B2[Realm Dashboard]
        B3[Clients list + detail + create]
        B4[Users list + detail + create]
    end
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Remaining Pages"]
        C1[Roles list + create]
        C2[Groups list + create]
        C3[Identity Providers]
        C4[Audit Trail + Diff viewer]
        C5[My Actions]
    end
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: New Features"]
        D1[Nebula VPN page]
        D2[Dark/light toggle]
        D3[Polish + responsive]
    end
    Phase1 --> Phase2 --> Phase3 --> Phase4
```

### Key Constraint

- **No PrimeVue/Tailwind hybrid phase** — remove PrimeVue once Phase 1 UI primitives are ready, then rebuild pages against the new components. Mixing two component libraries creates visual inconsistency.

---

## 11. Out of Scope

- Backend API changes (none needed, all endpoints exist)
- Keycloak configuration changes
- Mobile-native app
- i18n / localization (can be added later)
- E2E tests (separate effort)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Frontend Redesign: Catalyst-Style Vue 3 Admin Portal

**Date:** 2026-04-02  
**Status:** Approved  
**Scope:** Complete frontend UI redesign — migrate from PrimeVue to Tailwind CSS + Headless UI, port Catalyst design patterns to Vue 3

---

## 1. Motivation

The current admin portal uses PrimeVue 4 (Aura theme). While functional, it looks generic. The goal is a best-in-class SaaS admin experience using Tailwind Plus (Tailwind UI) — specifically porting [Catalyst](https://tailwindui.com/templates/catalyst)'s dark-first design language to Vue 3.

Catalyst is React-only. The strategy: use `@headlessui/vue` (official Vue port of the same accessibility primitives) and replicate Catalyst's exact Tailwind class patterns in Vue SFCs.

---

## 2. Design Principles

- **Dark mode first** — dark zinc sidebar, content area toggles dark/light
- **Information density over decoration** — show data, not chrome
- **One realm in focus** — sidebar-top dropdown switches realm context
- **Slide-overs over modals** — create/edit forms use slide-over panels, not blocking dialogs
- **Consistent component vocabulary** — ~12 reusable primitives, used everywhere

---

## 3. Layout Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Shell["App Shell"]
        direction TB
        subgraph Sidebar["Dark Sidebar (zinc-900)"]
            RS[Realm Switcher Dropdown]
            NAV[Nav Items]
            UM[User Menu + Sign Out]
        end
        subgraph Content["Content Area"]
            HEADER[Page Header + Breadcrumbs]
            BODY[Page Content]
        end
    end
    RS --> NAV --> UM
    Sidebar --- Content
```

### Sidebar Navigation Items

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Realm Switcher] --> B[Dashboard]
    B --> C[Clients]
    C --> D[Users]
    D --> E[Roles]
    E --> F[Groups]
    F --> G[Identity Providers]
    G --> H[Audit Trail]
    H --> I[---]
    J --> K[My Actions]
    K --> L[User Menu / Sign Out]
```

---

## 4. Color System

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **Neutral** | Zinc scale | Sidebar, borders, text, backgrounds |
| **Primary** | Indigo | Active nav, primary buttons, links |
| **Danger** | Red | Delete actions, error states |
| **Warning** | Amber | Expiry warnings, caution badges |
| **Success** | Emerald | Enabled states, success toasts |

Typography: **Inter** (already in use), `text-sm` base, `font-semibold` headings. Follows Catalyst's type scale.

---

## 5. Component Library

Reusable Vue SFCs porting Catalyst's patterns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Primitives["UI Primitives (components/ui/)"]
        BTN[Button.vue]
        BDG[Badge.vue]
        TBL[Table.vue]
        SL[StackedList.vue]
        DL[DescriptionList.vue]
        DLG[Dialog.vue]
        SO[SlideOver.vue]
        DD[Dropdown.vue]
        ES[EmptyState.vue]
        ST[Stats.vue]
        TST[Toast.vue]
        INP[Input.vue]
    end

    subgraph Layout["Layout (components/layout/)"]
        SBL[SidebarLayout.vue]
        SBN[SidebarNav.vue]
        RSW[RealmSwitcher.vue]
        UMN[UserMenu.vue]
    end

    subgraph Domain["Domain Components"]
        CC[ClientCard.vue]
        CD[ClientDetail.vue]
        UT[UserTable.vue]
        UD[UserDetail.vue]
        AT[AuditTable.vue]
        AD[AuditDiffSlideOver.vue]
        CL[CertificateList.vue]
        GC[GenerateCertSlideOver.vue]
    end

    Layout --> Primitives
    Domain --> Primitives
```

### Component Specifications

| Component | Headless UI Primitive | Purpose |
|-----------|----------------------|---------|
| `Button` | — | Primary (indigo), secondary (zinc), danger (red), ghost variants |
| `Badge` | — | Status dots + labels (enabled/disabled, public/confidential, etc.) |
| `Table` | — | Sortable columns, row click, pagination footer |
| `StackedList` | — | Card-style list for clients, roles, groups, IDPs |
| `DescriptionList` | — | Key-value layout for detail pages |
| `Dialog` | `DialogPanel` | Confirmation dialogs (delete, revert) |
| `SlideOver` | `DialogPanel` | Create/edit forms slide in from right |
| `Dropdown` | `Menu` | Realm switcher, user menu, action menus |
| `EmptyState` | — | Illustrated placeholder when lists are empty |
| `Stats` | — | Dashboard summary cards with label + value + trend |
| `Toast` | `Transition` | Success/error notifications, auto-dismiss |
| `Input` | — | Text, select, textarea with label + error state |

---

|   |   +-- EmptyState.vue
|   |   +-- Stats.vue
|   |   +-- Toast.vue
|   |   +-- Input.vue
|   +-- layout/                      # App shell
|   |   +-- SidebarLayout.vue
|   |   +-- SidebarNav.vue
|   |   +-- RealmSwitcher.vue
|   |   +-- UserMenu.vue
|   +-- audit/
|   |   +-- AuditTable.vue
|   |   +-- AuditDiffSlideOver.vue
|   +-- clients/
|   |   +-- ClientCard.vue
|   |   +-- ClientDetail.vue
|   |   +-- CreateApplicationSlideOver.vue
|   +-- users/
|   |   +-- UserTable.vue
|   |   +-- UserDetail.vue
+-- pages/                           # File-based routing (same structure)
+-- api/                             # Unchanged
+-- stores/                          # Unchanged
+-- types/                           # Unchanged
+-- utils/                           # Unchanged
```

---

## 10. Migration Strategy

The migration is a **full visual rewrite** — every page template changes, but business logic (API clients, stores, types, router guards, Keycloak integration) stays identical.

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Foundation"]
        A1[Install deps, configure Tailwind]
        A2[Build UI primitives]
        A3[Build SidebarLayout + RealmSwitcher]
    end
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Core Pages"]
        B1[Login page]
        B2[Realm Dashboard]
        B3[Clients list + detail + create]
        B4[Users list + detail + create]
    end
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Remaining Pages"]
        C1[Roles list + create]
        C2[Groups list + create]
        C3[Identity Providers]
        C4[Audit Trail + Diff viewer]
        C5[My Actions]
    end
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: New Features"]
        D1[Nebula VPN page]
        D2[Dark/light toggle]
        D3[Polish + responsive]
    end
    Phase1 --> Phase2 --> Phase3 --> Phase4
```

### Key Constraint

- **No PrimeVue/Tailwind hybrid phase** — remove PrimeVue once Phase 1 UI primitives are ready, then rebuild pages against the new components. Mixing two component libraries creates visual inconsistency.

---

## 11. Out of Scope

- Backend API changes (none needed, all endpoints exist)
- Keycloak configuration changes
- Mobile-native app
- i18n / localization (can be added later)
- E2E tests (separate effort)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Frontend Redesign: Catalyst-Style Vue 3 Admin Portal

**Date:** 2026-04-02  
**Status:** Approved  
**Scope:** Complete frontend UI redesign — migrate from PrimeVue to Tailwind CSS + Headless UI, port Catalyst design patterns to Vue 3

---

## 1. Motivation

The current admin portal uses PrimeVue 4 (Aura theme). While functional, it looks generic. The goal is a best-in-class SaaS admin experience using Tailwind Plus (Tailwind UI) — specifically porting [Catalyst](https://tailwindui.com/templates/catalyst)'s dark-first design language to Vue 3.

Catalyst is React-only. The strategy: use `@headlessui/vue` (official Vue port of the same accessibility primitives) and replicate Catalyst's exact Tailwind class patterns in Vue SFCs.

---

## 2. Design Principles

- **Dark mode first** — dark zinc sidebar, content area toggles dark/light
- **Information density over decoration** — show data, not chrome
- **One realm in focus** — sidebar-top dropdown switches realm context
- **Slide-overs over modals** — create/edit forms use slide-over panels, not blocking dialogs
- **Consistent component vocabulary** — ~12 reusable primitives, used everywhere

---

## 3. Layout Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Shell["App Shell"]
        direction TB
        subgraph Sidebar["Dark Sidebar (zinc-900)"]
            RS[Realm Switcher Dropdown]
            NAV[Nav Items]
            UM[User Menu + Sign Out]
        end
        subgraph Content["Content Area"]
            HEADER[Page Header + Breadcrumbs]
            BODY[Page Content]
        end
    end
    RS --> NAV --> UM
    Sidebar --- Content
```

### Sidebar Navigation Items

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Realm Switcher] --> B[Dashboard]
    B --> C[Clients]
    C --> D[Users]
    D --> E[Roles]
    E --> F[Groups]
    F --> G[Identity Providers]
    G --> H[Audit Trail]
    H --> I[---]
    J --> K[My Actions]
    K --> L[User Menu / Sign Out]
```

---

## 4. Color System

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **Neutral** | Zinc scale | Sidebar, borders, text, backgrounds |
| **Primary** | Indigo | Active nav, primary buttons, links |
| **Danger** | Red | Delete actions, error states |
| **Warning** | Amber | Expiry warnings, caution badges |
| **Success** | Emerald | Enabled states, success toasts |

Typography: **Inter** (already in use), `text-sm` base, `font-semibold` headings. Follows Catalyst's type scale.

---

## 5. Component Library

Reusable Vue SFCs porting Catalyst's patterns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Primitives["UI Primitives (components/ui/)"]
        BTN[Button.vue]
        BDG[Badge.vue]
        TBL[Table.vue]
        SL[StackedList.vue]
        DL[DescriptionList.vue]
        DLG[Dialog.vue]
        SO[SlideOver.vue]
        DD[Dropdown.vue]
        ES[EmptyState.vue]
        ST[Stats.vue]
        TST[Toast.vue]
        INP[Input.vue]
    end

    subgraph Layout["Layout (components/layout/)"]
        SBL[SidebarLayout.vue]
        SBN[SidebarNav.vue]
        RSW[RealmSwitcher.vue]
        UMN[UserMenu.vue]
    end

    subgraph Domain["Domain Components"]
        CC[ClientCard.vue]
        CD[ClientDetail.vue]
        UT[UserTable.vue]
        UD[UserDetail.vue]
        AT[AuditTable.vue]
        AD[AuditDiffSlideOver.vue]
        CL[CertificateList.vue]
        GC[GenerateCertSlideOver.vue]
    end

    Layout --> Primitives
    Domain --> Primitives
```

### Component Specifications

| Component | Headless UI Primitive | Purpose |
|-----------|----------------------|---------|
| `Button` | — | Primary (indigo), secondary (zinc), danger (red), ghost variants |
| `Badge` | — | Status dots + labels (enabled/disabled, public/confidential, etc.) |
| `Table` | — | Sortable columns, row click, pagination footer |
| `StackedList` | — | Card-style list for clients, roles, groups, IDPs |
| `DescriptionList` | — | Key-value layout for detail pages |
| `Dialog` | `DialogPanel` | Confirmation dialogs (delete, revert) |
| `SlideOver` | `DialogPanel` | Create/edit forms slide in from right |
| `Dropdown` | `Menu` | Realm switcher, user menu, action menus |
| `EmptyState` | — | Illustrated placeholder when lists are empty |
| `Stats` | — | Dashboard summary cards with label + value + trend |
| `Toast` | `Transition` | Success/error notifications, auto-dismiss |
| `Input` | — | Text, select, textarea with label + error state |

---

## 6. Page Wireframes

Every page below is shown as an ASCII wireframe. The left sidebar is consistent across all authenticated pages.

### 6.1 Login (`/login`)

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                    |
|                         (dark background)                          |
|                                                                    |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |      [Ravencloak Logo]     |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |   Multi-tenant auth admin  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |  | Sign in with Keycloak|  |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                                                                    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

- No sidebar, full-page centered card
- Single CTA redirects to Keycloak
- After auth, redirects to `/realms`

### 6.2 Realm Dashboard (`/realms/[name]`)

| Clnts |  | * admin@co created user "jane@co"      5 hr ago  |    |
| Users |  | * admin@co synced realm                 1 day ago |    |

+-------+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

- 4 stat cards in a row (click-through to respective list page)
- Mini audit timeline (last 5 events)
- Quick action buttons for most common tasks

## 7. Routing (File-Based)

```mermaid
graph TD
    LOGIN["/login"] --> REALMS["/realms"]
    REALMS --> REALM["/realms/[name]"]
    REALM --> DASHBOARD["/realms/[name] (dashboard)"]
    REALM --> CLIENTS["/realms/[name]/clients"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_CREATE["/realms/[name]/clients/create"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/clients/[clientId]"]
    REALM --> USERS["/realms/[name]/users"]
    USERS --> USER_CREATE["/realms/[name]/users/create"]
    USERS --> USER_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/users/[userId]"]
    REALM --> ROLES["/realms/[name]/roles"]
    ROLES --> ROLE_CREATE["/realms/[name]/roles/create"]
    REALM --> GROUPS["/realms/[name]/groups"]
    GROUPS --> GROUP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/groups/create"]
    REALM --> IDP["/realms/[name]/idp"]
    IDP --> IDP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/idp/create"]
    REALM --> AUDIT["/realms/[name]/audit"]
    MY_ACTIONS["/my-actions"]
    ACCESS_DENIED["/access-denied"]
```

Routes mirror the existing file-based structure under `src/pages/`.

---

## 8. Dependency Changes

### Remove

| Package | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| `primevue` | Replaced by Tailwind + Headless UI |
| `@primevue/themes` | No longer needed |
| `primeicons` | Replaced by Heroicons |

### Add

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@headlessui/vue` | ^1.7 | Accessible primitives (Dialog, Menu, Transition, Tab, etc.) |
| `@heroicons/vue` | ^2.1 | Icon set matching Catalyst |
| `@tailwindcss/forms` | ^0.5 | Form element reset/styling |
| `@tailwindcss/typography` | ^0.5 | Prose styling for rich text |

### Keep (Unchanged)

- `vue@^3.5`, `vue-router`, `pinia`, `pinia-plugin-persistedstate`
- `axios`, `keycloak-js`
- `unplugin-vue-router`
- `@opentelemetry/*` stack
- `typescript`, `vite`, `eslint`

---

## 9. File Structure

```
web/src/
+-- components/
|   +-- ui/                          # Design system (Catalyst port)
|   |   +-- Button.vue
|   |   +-- Badge.vue
|   |   +-- Table.vue
|   |   +-- StackedList.vue
|   |   +-- DescriptionList.vue
|   |   +-- Dialog.vue
|   |   +-- SlideOver.vue
|   |   +-- Dropdown.vue
|   |   +-- EmptyState.vue
|   |   +-- Stats.vue
|   |   +-- Toast.vue
|   |   +-- Input.vue
|   +-- layout/                      # App shell
|   |   +-- SidebarLayout.vue
|   |   +-- SidebarNav.vue
|   |   +-- RealmSwitcher.vue
|   |   +-- UserMenu.vue
|   +-- audit/
|   |   +-- AuditTable.vue
|   |   +-- AuditDiffSlideOver.vue
|   +-- clients/
|   |   +-- ClientCard.vue
|   |   +-- ClientDetail.vue
|   |   +-- CreateApplicationSlideOver.vue
|   +-- users/
|   |   +-- UserTable.vue
|   |   +-- UserDetail.vue
+-- pages/                           # File-based routing (same structure)
+-- api/                             # Unchanged
+-- stores/                          # Unchanged
+-- types/                           # Unchanged
+-- utils/                           # Unchanged
```

---

## 10. Migration Strategy

The migration is a **full visual rewrite** — every page template changes, but business logic (API clients, stores, types, router guards, Keycloak integration) stays identical.

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Foundation"]
        A1[Install deps, configure Tailwind]
        A2[Build UI primitives]
        A3[Build SidebarLayout + RealmSwitcher]
    end
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Core Pages"]
        B1[Login page]
        B2[Realm Dashboard]
        B3[Clients list + detail + create]
        B4[Users list + detail + create]
    end
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Remaining Pages"]
        C1[Roles list + create]
        C2[Groups list + create]
        C3[Identity Providers]
        C4[Audit Trail + Diff viewer]
        C5[My Actions]
    end
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: New Features"]
        D1[Nebula VPN page]
        D2[Dark/light toggle]
        D3[Polish + responsive]
    end
    Phase1 --> Phase2 --> Phase3 --> Phase4
```

### Key Constraint

- **No PrimeVue/Tailwind hybrid phase** — remove PrimeVue once Phase 1 UI primitives are ready, then rebuild pages against the new components. Mixing two component libraries creates visual inconsistency.

---

## 11. Out of Scope

- Backend API changes (none needed, all endpoints exist)
- Keycloak configuration changes
- Mobile-native app
- i18n / localization (can be added later)
- E2E tests (separate effort)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Frontend Redesign: Catalyst-Style Vue 3 Admin Portal

**Date:** 2026-04-02  
**Status:** Approved  
**Scope:** Complete frontend UI redesign — migrate from PrimeVue to Tailwind CSS + Headless UI, port Catalyst design patterns to Vue 3

---

## 1. Motivation

The current admin portal uses PrimeVue 4 (Aura theme). While functional, it looks generic. The goal is a best-in-class SaaS admin experience using Tailwind Plus (Tailwind UI) — specifically porting [Catalyst](https://tailwindui.com/templates/catalyst)'s dark-first design language to Vue 3.

Catalyst is React-only. The strategy: use `@headlessui/vue` (official Vue port of the same accessibility primitives) and replicate Catalyst's exact Tailwind class patterns in Vue SFCs.

---

## 2. Design Principles

- **Dark mode first** — dark zinc sidebar, content area toggles dark/light
- **Information density over decoration** — show data, not chrome
- **One realm in focus** — sidebar-top dropdown switches realm context
- **Slide-overs over modals** — create/edit forms use slide-over panels, not blocking dialogs
- **Consistent component vocabulary** — ~12 reusable primitives, used everywhere

---

## 3. Layout Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Shell["App Shell"]
        direction TB
        subgraph Sidebar["Dark Sidebar (zinc-900)"]
            RS[Realm Switcher Dropdown]
            NAV[Nav Items]
            UM[User Menu + Sign Out]
        end
        subgraph Content["Content Area"]
            HEADER[Page Header + Breadcrumbs]
            BODY[Page Content]
        end
    end
    RS --> NAV --> UM
    Sidebar --- Content
```

### Sidebar Navigation Items

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Realm Switcher] --> B[Dashboard]
    B --> C[Clients]
    C --> D[Users]
    D --> E[Roles]
    E --> F[Groups]
    F --> G[Identity Providers]
    G --> H[Audit Trail]
    H --> I[---]
    J --> K[My Actions]
    K --> L[User Menu / Sign Out]
```

---

## 4. Color System

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **Neutral** | Zinc scale | Sidebar, borders, text, backgrounds |
| **Primary** | Indigo | Active nav, primary buttons, links |
| **Danger** | Red | Delete actions, error states |
| **Warning** | Amber | Expiry warnings, caution badges |
| **Success** | Emerald | Enabled states, success toasts |

Typography: **Inter** (already in use), `text-sm` base, `font-semibold` headings. Follows Catalyst's type scale.

---

## 5. Component Library

Reusable Vue SFCs porting Catalyst's patterns:

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Primitives["UI Primitives (components/ui/)"]
        BTN[Button.vue]
        BDG[Badge.vue]
        TBL[Table.vue]
        SL[StackedList.vue]
        DL[DescriptionList.vue]
        DLG[Dialog.vue]
        SO[SlideOver.vue]
        DD[Dropdown.vue]
        ES[EmptyState.vue]
        ST[Stats.vue]
        TST[Toast.vue]
        INP[Input.vue]
    end

    subgraph Layout["Layout (components/layout/)"]
        SBL[SidebarLayout.vue]
        SBN[SidebarNav.vue]
        RSW[RealmSwitcher.vue]
        UMN[UserMenu.vue]
    end

    subgraph Domain["Domain Components"]
        CC[ClientCard.vue]
        CD[ClientDetail.vue]
        UT[UserTable.vue]
        UD[UserDetail.vue]
        AT[AuditTable.vue]
        AD[AuditDiffSlideOver.vue]
        CL[CertificateList.vue]
        GC[GenerateCertSlideOver.vue]
    end

    Layout --> Primitives
    Domain --> Primitives
```

### Component Specifications

| Component | Headless UI Primitive | Purpose |
|-----------|----------------------|---------|
| `Button` | — | Primary (indigo), secondary (zinc), danger (red), ghost variants |
| `Badge` | — | Status dots + labels (enabled/disabled, public/confidential, etc.) |
| `Table` | — | Sortable columns, row click, pagination footer |
| `StackedList` | — | Card-style list for clients, roles, groups, IDPs |
| `DescriptionList` | — | Key-value layout for detail pages |
| `Dialog` | `DialogPanel` | Confirmation dialogs (delete, revert) |
| `SlideOver` | `DialogPanel` | Create/edit forms slide in from right |
| `Dropdown` | `Menu` | Realm switcher, user menu, action menus |
| `EmptyState` | — | Illustrated placeholder when lists are empty |
| `Stats` | — | Dashboard summary cards with label + value + trend |
| `Toast` | `Transition` | Success/error notifications, auto-dismiss |
| `Input` | — | Text, select, textarea with label + error state |

---

## 6. Page Wireframes

Every page below is shown as an ASCII wireframe. The left sidebar is consistent across all authenticated pages.

### 6.1 Login (`/login`)

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                    |

|                    |      [Ravencloak Logo]     |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |   Multi-tenant auth admin  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |  | Sign in with Keycloak|  |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                                                                    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

- No sidebar, full-page centered card
- Single CTA redirects to Keycloak
- After auth, redirects to `/realms`

|                    |   You need SUPER_ADMIN      |                  |
|                    |   role to access this app.  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |  |    Sign Out          |  |                  |
|                    |  +----------------------+  |                  |
|                    |                            |                  |
|                    +----------------------------+                  |
|                                                                    |
+------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

- No sidebar, same centered card pattern as login
- Clear message about required role
- Sign out button

---

## 7. Routing (File-Based)

```mermaid
graph TD
    LOGIN["/login"] --> REALMS["/realms"]
    REALMS --> REALM["/realms/[name]"]
    REALM --> DASHBOARD["/realms/[name] (dashboard)"]
    REALM --> CLIENTS["/realms/[name]/clients"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_CREATE["/realms/[name]/clients/create"]
    CLIENTS --> CLIENT_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/clients/[clientId]"]
    REALM --> USERS["/realms/[name]/users"]
    USERS --> USER_CREATE["/realms/[name]/users/create"]
    USERS --> USER_DETAIL["/realms/[name]/users/[userId]"]
    REALM --> ROLES["/realms/[name]/roles"]
    ROLES --> ROLE_CREATE["/realms/[name]/roles/create"]
    REALM --> GROUPS["/realms/[name]/groups"]
    GROUPS --> GROUP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/groups/create"]
    REALM --> IDP["/realms/[name]/idp"]
    IDP --> IDP_CREATE["/realms/[name]/idp/create"]
    REALM --> AUDIT["/realms/[name]/audit"]
    MY_ACTIONS["/my-actions"]
    ACCESS_DENIED["/access-denied"]
```

Routes mirror the existing file-based structure under `src/pages/`.

---

## 8. Dependency Changes

### Remove

| Package | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| `primevue` | Replaced by Tailwind + Headless UI |
| `@primevue/themes` | No longer needed |
| `primeicons` | Replaced by Heroicons |

### Add

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@headlessui/vue` | ^1.7 | Accessible primitives (Dialog, Menu, Transition, Tab, etc.) |
| `@heroicons/vue` | ^2.1 | Icon set matching Catalyst |
| `@tailwindcss/forms` | ^0.5 | Form element reset/styling |
| `@tailwindcss/typography` | ^0.5 | Prose styling for rich text |

### Keep (Unchanged)

- `vue@^3.5`, `vue-router`, `pinia`, `pinia-plugin-persistedstate`
- `axios`, `keycloak-js`
- `unplugin-vue-router`
- `@opentelemetry/*` stack
- `typescript`, `vite`, `eslint`

---

## 9. File Structure

```
web/src/
+-- components/
|   +-- ui/                          # Design system (Catalyst port)
|   |   +-- Button.vue
|   |   +-- Badge.vue
|   |   +-- Table.vue
|   |   +-- StackedList.vue
|   |   +-- DescriptionList.vue
|   |   +-- Dialog.vue
|   |   +-- SlideOver.vue
|   |   +-- Dropdown.vue
|   |   +-- EmptyState.vue
|   |   +-- Stats.vue
|   |   +-- Toast.vue
|   |   +-- Input.vue
|   +-- layout/                      # App shell
|   |   +-- SidebarLayout.vue
|   |   +-- SidebarNav.vue
|   |   +-- RealmSwitcher.vue
|   |   +-- UserMenu.vue
|   +-- audit/
|   |   +-- AuditTable.vue
|   |   +-- AuditDiffSlideOver.vue
|   +-- clients/
|   |   +-- ClientCard.vue
|   |   +-- ClientDetail.vue
|   |   +-- CreateApplicationSlideOver.vue
|   +-- users/
|   |   +-- UserTable.vue
|   |   +-- UserDetail.vue
+-- pages/                           # File-based routing (same structure)
+-- api/                             # Unchanged
+-- stores/                          # Unchanged
+-- types/                           # Unchanged
+-- utils/                           # Unchanged
```

---

## 10. Migration Strategy

The migration is a **full visual rewrite** — every page template changes, but business logic (API clients, stores, types, router guards, Keycloak integration) stays identical.

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Foundation"]
        A1[Install deps, configure Tailwind]
        A2[Build UI primitives]
        A3[Build SidebarLayout + RealmSwitcher]
    end
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Core Pages"]
        B1[Login page]
        B2[Realm Dashboard]
        B3[Clients list + detail + create]
        B4[Users list + detail + create]
    end
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Remaining Pages"]
        C1[Roles list + create]
        C2[Groups list + create]
        C3[Identity Providers]
        C4[Audit Trail + Diff viewer]
        C5[My Actions]
    end
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: Polish"]
        D1[Dark/light toggle]
        D2[Responsive improvements]
        D3[Accessibility audit]
    end
    Phase1 --> Phase2 --> Phase3 --> Phase4
```

### Key Constraint

- **No PrimeVue/Tailwind hybrid phase** — remove PrimeVue once Phase 1 UI primitives are ready, then rebuild pages against the new components. Mixing two component libraries creates visual inconsistency.

---

## 11. Out of Scope

- Backend API changes (none needed, all endpoints exist)
- Keycloak configuration changes
- Mobile-native app
- i18n / localization (can be added later)
- E2E tests (separate effort)

gh pr create --title "feat: Catalyst UI redesign + remove Nebula & DSJ branding" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- **Frontend redesign**: Complete rewrite of the Vue 3 admin portal from PrimeVue 4 to Tailwind CSS v4 + Headless UI, porting Catalyst UI Kit patterns to Vue 3 SFCs
- **Remove Nebula sidecar**: Deleted `go-nebula-sidecar/` module and all associated CI/CD steps, pages, and nav items
- **Remove DSJ branding**: Replaced all `dsjkeeplearning`/`kos-auth-backend` references with `ravencloak-org`/`ravencloak` across the entire codebase
- **Resolve merge conflict**: Fixed `docker-compose.yml` conflict using `ravencloak-org` image references

## Frontend Changes

- Replaced PrimeVue with Tailwind CSS v4 (`@tailwindcss/vite`), `@headlessui/vue`, `@heroicons/vue`
- New component library in `web/src/components/ui/`: Button, Badge, Input, Select, Dialog, SlideOver, Dropdown, Table, Toast, Tabs, EmptyState
- New layout shell: `SidebarLayout`, `SidebarNav`, `RealmSwitcher`, `UserMenu`
- All pages rewritten: login, realms, clients, users, roles, groups, identity providers, audit trail, my-actions, realm create
- Dark-first design using zinc palette (Catalyst aesthetic)

## CI/CD

- Updated all image refs: `ghcr.io/ravencloak-org/ravencloak` (backend) and `ghcr.io/ravencloak-org/ravencloak-web` (frontend)
- Removed nebula-sidecar build/deploy steps from all pipelines

## Test plan

- [ ] `cd web && npm run build` — verify no TypeScript/build errors
- [ ] `npm run dev` — verify dev server starts and login page renders
- [ ] Navigate to `/realms` — verify realm list with sidebar layout
- [ ] Verify no PrimeVue components remain in the bundle
- [ ] Verify no Nebula routes or nav items appear

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

input.description: Check for wrangler config and nginx conf

content.text:
Good. Here's the full picture:

---

## Running locally right now

```bash
cd web
cp .env.example .env.local
```

Then edit `.env.local` — you need a running Keycloak to log in. Two options:

**Option A — start local Keycloak (docker)**
```bash
# from repo root
docker compose up keycloak postgres -d
```
`.env.local` stays as-is (points to `localhost:8088`). The Vite proxy in `vite.config.ts` forwards `/api → localhost:8080` automatically, so leave `VITE_API_BASE_URL` empty.

**Option B — point at an already-deployed Keycloak**
```
VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL=https://your-keycloak.example.com
VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM=saas-admin
REDACTED
VITE_API_BASE_URL=   # empty, Vite proxy handles /api → localhost:8080
```

Then:
```bash
npm install
npm run dev
# → http://localhost:5173
```

Login will work (Keycloak handles auth). API calls will fail gracefully until the backend is up — you'll see the UI, empty states, and error toasts.

---

## Cloudflare Pages setup

**1. Add the `_redirects` file** (required for SPA routing — CF Pages returns 404 on direct URL hits without it):

content.content: File created successfully at: /Users/jobinlawrance/Project/dsj/ravencloak/web/public/_redirects

content.text:
**2. CF Pages dashboard settings:**

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| Framework preset | None (Vite) |
| Build command | `npm run build` |
| Build output dir | `dist` |
| Root directory | `web` |

**3. Environment variables to set in CF Pages dashboard:**

| Variable | Value |
|---|---|
| `VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL` | `https://your-keycloak.example.com` |
| `VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM` | `saas-admin` |
| `VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID` | `kos-admin-web` |
| `VITE_API_BASE_URL` | `https://api.ravencloak.com` ← your backend URL (once deployed) |
| `VITE_OTEL_ENABLED` | `false` |

Until the backend is deployed, you can set `VITE_API_BASE_URL` to anything — login flows through Keycloak directly so the UI will load and authenticate. API calls will return errors in the UI but won't break the app.

**4. Keycloak client update** — once CF Pages assigns you a domain (e.g. `ravencloak.pages.dev`), add it to the `kos-admin-web` client in Keycloak:
- Valid redirect URIs: `https://ravencloak.pages.dev/*`
- Web origins: `https://ravencloak.pages.dev`

content.text:
**To run locally right now**, the minimal steps are:

```bash
cd web
cp .env.example .env.local
# Edit VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL to point to a running Keycloak
npm install
npm run dev
```

If you want to spin up just Keycloak locally without touching anything else:
```bash
# from repo root
docker compose up keycloak postgres -d
# wait ~30s for it to start, then open http://localhost:5173
```

One thing worth knowing: `VITE_API_BASE_URL` is left empty in dev because the Vite dev server proxies `/api` and `/auth` to `localhost:8080`. So the UI will work, show proper empty states, and fail gracefully on API calls until the Spring Boot backend is running alongside it. No changes needed to the code for that.
